ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the data was collected */,
  "mandal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mandal where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Amount of rainfall in mm */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature in °C */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature in °C */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity in % */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity in % */,
  "min_wind_speed" REAL /* Minimum wind speed in kmph */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in kmph */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Description of the data source (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_collector" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person or device that collected the data */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_mandal_id FOREIGN KEY ("mandal_id") REFERENCES mandals ("mandal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the district belongs to */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the district in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the district (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mandals" (
  "mandal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mandal */,
  "mandal_name" TEXT /* Name of the mandal */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the mandal belongs to */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the mandal in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the mandal */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the mandal in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the mandal (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mandal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mandals_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "mandal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mandal the station is located in */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used (e.g., ultrasonic, mechanical) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_mandal_id FOREIGN KEY ("mandal_id") REFERENCES mandals ("mandal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rainfall_data" (
  "rainfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rainfall data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry this rainfall data belongs to */,
  "rainfall_amount" REAL /* Amount of rainfall in mm */,
  "rainfall_duration" REAL /* Duration of rainfall in hours */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Description of the data source (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rainfall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rainfall_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry this temperature data belongs to */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature in °C */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature in °C */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Description of the data source (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_data" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry this humidity data belongs to */,
  "min_humidity" REAL /* Minimum humidity in % */,
  "max_humidity" REAL /* Maximum humidity in % */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Description of the data source (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_data" (
  "wind_speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry this wind speed data belongs to */,
  "min_wind_speed" REAL /* Minimum wind speed in kmph */,
  "max_wind_speed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in kmph */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Description of the data source (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data this version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date this version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about this version */,
  "version_by" TEXT /* ID or name of the user who created the version */,
  "version_method" TEXT /* Method used to create the version (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_versions_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data this file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the file (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
